title: 40cm Vintage Green Zinc Trough Planter with Handles - Durable Indoor & Outdoor Flower Pot, UV & Frost Resistant, Perfect for Various Plants & Flowers, No Drainage Holes
features: ☑️DURABLE AND ATTRACTIVE: Made of zinc, this vintage cream flower pot is both UV and frost resistant, allowing it to withstand all elements of weather, making it ideal for both indoor and outdoor gardening.

☑️SPACIOUS AND VERSATILE: With a sizeable length of 40cm, width of 16cm, and height of 21cm, this zinc trough planter is perfect for planting a wide variety of plants, from traditional bedding plants and flowers to vegetables and more.

☑️VINTAGE DESIGN: This planter's chic vintage design, coupled with practical handles, makes it an attractive addition to any space, indoors or outdoors, adding a touch of timeless charm to your gardening endeavours.
☑️FLEXIBLE WATERING: This planter does not come with pre-drilled drainage holes, providing you with the flexibility to control the moisture level of your plants based on their individual needs.
☑️STURDY AND PRACTICAL: The sturdy construction and practical handles of this planter ensure easy mobility and long-lasting use, making your gardening experience more enjoyable and efficient.
description: Zinc Trough Planter With Handles Made of Zinc, this planter can withstand all elements of weather Suitable for indoor or outdoor use with its lovely vintage style UV & frost resistant This tub is perfect for planting traditional bedding plants, tulips, daffodils, tomato plants, strawberry plants or lots of other plants Length 40cm x Width 16cm x Height 21cm No Drainage holes Features: Stunning Zinc Bucket Planter With handles Length 40cm Chic Vintage design Indoor & Outdoor use
